data.title: Create ticket-tag.sh, ticket-untag.sh, update ticket dispatcher
data.description:
Create thin wrapper scripts and update plugins/dso/scripts/ticket dispatcher. Makes CLI tests 6-7 from test-ticket-tag.sh pass GREEN.

testing_mode: GREEN

ticket-tag.sh (CREATE):
- Validate args (ticket_id + tag_name required)
- source ticket-lib.sh
- Call _tag_add "$1" "$2"
- chmod +x

ticket-untag.sh (CREATE):
- Validate args, source ticket-lib.sh, call _tag_remove
- chmod +x

plugins/dso/scripts/ticket dispatcher (EDIT):
- Add tag) case routing to ticket-tag.sh
- Add untag) case routing to ticket-untag.sh
- Update _usage() to list 'tag' and 'untag' subcommands

AC: tests 6-7 (test_ticket_tag_cli_adds_tag, test_ticket_untag_cli_removes_tag) pass GREEN
AC: bash tests/run-all.sh passes — all 7 tests in test-ticket-tag.sh are GREEN
AC: ticket tag --help (or unknown subcommand) shows tag/untag in usage

Files: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-tag.sh (CREATE), plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-untag.sh (CREATE), plugins/dso/scripts/ticket (EDIT)
